coverage_note: The bundled TNF population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from TNF TNF receptor signaling, NF-kappaB activation, apoptosis/necroptosis crosstalk, inflammation, and anti-TNF pharmacology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000232810: TNF coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: TNF findings should be read against TNF receptor signaling, NF-kappaB activation, apoptosis/necroptosis crosstalk, inflammation, and anti-TNF pharmacology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs1800629 (TNF -308G>A) is curated as a TNF marker for Autoimmune and inflammatory disease context, TNF-blocker pharmacology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
